=== no_menus
# MenuBar with no menus — empty bar.
widget: menubar
width: 30
height: 1
===

=== single_menu
# MenuBar with one menu entry; no focus.
widget: menubar
width: 30
height: 1
menu: &File
===
 File

=== multiple_menus
# MenuBar with three menu entries; no focus.
widget: menubar
width: 40
height: 1
menu: &File
menu: &Edit
menu: &Help
===
 File │ Edit │ Help

=== focused_first
# MenuBar with focus on the first menu (cursor=0, menu_focused=true).
widget: menubar
width: 40
height: 1
menu: &File
menu: &Edit
menu: &Help
menu_cursor: 0
menu_focused: true
===
►File │ Edit │ Help

=== focused_second
# MenuBar with focus on the second menu.
widget: menubar
width: 40
height: 1
menu: &File
menu: &Edit
menu: &Help
menu_cursor: 1
menu_focused: true
===
 File │►Edit │ Help

=== open_first_cursor_first
# File menu open with cursor on first item (Open).
widget: menubar
width: 40
height: 7
menu: &File
menu: &Edit
open_menu: 0
menu_cursor: 0
drop_cursor: 0
item: &Open
item: &Save
item: ---
item: E&xit
===
►File │ Edit
╔══════════════╗
║►Open         ║
║ Save         ║
║──────────────║
║ Exit         ║
╚══════════════╝

=== open_first_cursor_third
# File menu open with cursor on third item (Exit, after separator).
widget: menubar
width: 40
height: 7
menu: &File
menu: &Edit
open_menu: 0
menu_cursor: 0
drop_cursor: 3
item: &Open
item: &Save
item: ---
item: E&xit
===
►File │ Edit
╔══════════════╗
║ Open         ║
║ Save         ║
║──────────────║
║►Exit         ║
╚══════════════╝

=== open_second
# Edit menu open, cursor on first item — dropdown anchored at Edit position.
widget: menubar
width: 40
height: 5
menu: &File
menu: &Edit
open_menu: 1
menu_cursor: 1
drop_cursor: 0
item: &Undo
item: &Redo
===
 File │►Edit
       ╔══════════════╗
       ║►Undo         ║
       ║ Redo         ║
       ╚══════════════╝
